description.NEAR_LANDMARK_CN: 瑪利諾修院學校(小學部)

2023-05-25T13:41:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Waterloo Road flyover (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Maryknoll Convent School (Primary Section) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T13:41:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的窩打老道天橋(往尖沙咀方向)近瑪利諾修院學校(小學部)的慢線現已解封。

2023-05-25T16:04:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to road incident , part of the lanes of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) near Lek Yuen Estate is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-05-25T16:04:00.CONTENT_CN:
因道路事故，大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)近瀝源邨的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-05-25T16:28:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to road incident , part of the lanes of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) near Lek Yuen Estate is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic queues on Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) ends at Tsing Sha Highway near Tai Wai Tunnel exit and Shing Mun Tunnel Road near Mei Lam Estate.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-05-25T16:28:00.CONTENT_CN:
因道路事故，大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)近瀝源邨的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)的車龍龍尾已到青沙公路近大圍隧道出口及城門隧道公路近美林邨。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-05-25T16:36:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) near Lek Yuen Estate which was closed due to road incident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T16:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因道路事故而封閉的大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)近瀝源邨的部份行車線現已解封。

2023-05-25T17:24:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , the slow lane of the slip road leading from Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) to Fo Tan Road is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-05-25T17:24:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，由大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)通往火炭路 的支路的慢線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-05-25T17:36:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of the slip road leading from Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) to Fo Tan Road  which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T17:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的由大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)通往火炭路 的支路的 慢線現已解封。

description.LOCATION_EN: Tuen Mun Road, Wong Chu Road, Lung Fu Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 屯門公路、皇珠路、龍富路

2023-05-25T18:39:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road sections are busy:
– Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound)
– Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound)
– Lung Fu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound)
Motorists passing through the above road section(s) are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2023-05-25T18:39:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:
–屯門公路(往元朗方向)
–皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)
–龍富路(往屯門公路方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2023-05-25T20:24:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic at the following road sections have resumed normal:
– Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound)
– Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound)
– Lung Fu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound).
2023-05-25T20:24:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
–屯門公路(往元朗方向)
–皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)
–龍富路(往屯門公路方向)。

2023-05-25T19:04:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , the slow lane of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near Eastern Harbour Centre is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-05-25T19:04:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，東區走廊(往柴灣方向)近東港中心的慢線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-05-25T19:21:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near Eastern Harbour Centre which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T19:21:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的東區走廊(往柴灣方向)近東港中心的慢線現已解封。
